code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut line_start = 0
mut found = false
mut found_start = 0
mut found_stop = 0

while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_newline = false
  if not at_end
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_newline = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  if at_end or is_newline
    mut j = line_start
    mut has_content = false
    while j < i
      match string.byte_at(input, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b != 32 and b != 9 and b != 13
          has_content = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if has_content
      found = true
      found_start = line_start
      found_stop = i
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(string.substring(input, found_start, found_stop))
else
  println("(none)")
end
